title: How to pull Subitems alone to a Board based on the Status
excerpt:
Hello there, 
I’d like to group all the Subitems with a specific Status to a Dashboard. Is there a way to achieve this?

posts.author: joexp (Joe)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there,

I’d like to group all the Subitems with a specific Status to a Dashboard. Is there a way to achieve this?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey there! You can do this with a Table Widget via the filter setting! Let us know if you have any questions about this at support@monday.com.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
